items.claim: John Garza gasses out when pushed to the third round.
items.quote: I've seen him get tired. What was that fight where he was really huffing and puffing? I was just watching earlier today. Uh he seriously gassed out against Nick Galagi.

items.claim: John Garza is fighting on one week's notice.
items.quote: He's fighting on short notice, a week's notice.

items.claim: Luke Riley has more power in his shots than Kai Kamaka III.
items.quote: Luke Riley's got pop to his shots. He definitely does more damage.

items.claim: Kai Kamaka III lacks finishing power.
Cody Garbrandt has not won a round in three years.
items.quote: Cody Garbrandt hasn't won a round in how long? His last legit win was year three years ago.

items.claim: Adrien Giannis utilizes fast hands and high-pressure combinations.
items.quote: Adrien Giannis has got fast hands, good pressure, good combinations, keeps it on you.

items.claim: Conor McGregor is coming off a five-year layoff.
items.quote: Conor's back after five years out the game

items.claim: Max Holloway maintains his pace and does not slow down in championship rounds.
items.quote: Max Holloway doesn't slow down in the championship rounds.

items.claim: Conor McGregor's current boxing coach is negatively impacting his performance.
items.quote: I talked about how that Crumblin boxing coach has been a nightmare for Conor McGregor.

items.claim: Conor McGregor's front kick to the body is among the best in the sport.
items.quote: His front kick up the middle maybe the best we've ever seen in the sport as well.
